title: Crop logo image to remove bottom white space for compact header

requirements.text: Crop the speaker logo image file to remove excess white space underneath the graphic, allowing the slogan to sit much closer to the logo and creating a more compact header overall

quotes: There is still too much white space between the logo and the slogan. Can you crop the logo underneath, so it'll allow the slogan to be much closer underneath it and the overall header to be much more compact

acceptanceCriteria: The logo image file has visible white space cropped from the bottom edge
The slogan appears visually closer to the logo graphic due to reduced image padding
The overall header section height is reduced as a result of the tighter logo-slogan spacing
The logo graphic itself remains intact and centered within the cropped image

nonGoals: Adjusting CSS margins or padding between logo and slogan
Changing the slogan text content or styling
Modifying header layout or component structure

edits: Crop the bottom edge to remove excess white space underneath the speaker graphic (speakr-logo.png > speakr-logo-cropped.dim_800x400.png)
